title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology discusses OpenClaw security risks affecting autonomous AI agents, covering threats including prompt injection and credential exposure. The video examines how agent autonomy, tool access, and memory mechanisms introduce real-world vulnerabilities and provides guidance on safe deployment practices.
